calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne for Steven Carr.

Mr. Byrne stated that he has a 13100 Small Estate Affidavit (presented in open Court), that he presented it to Bank of the West, that the Bank provided a cashier's check in the amount of $35,000.00 payable to the Estate of Reginald Carr and that the Bank would not comply with 13100. Mr. Byrne also stated that it is his belief that much of this amount will go to creditors. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Nov-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
